description.value: Aura faint enchantment; CL 3rd; Slot chest; Price 6,000 gp; Weight 2 lbs. DESCRIPTION This loose-fitting blouse is adorned with grotesque fetishes and trophies, granting the wearer a +2 competence bonus on Intimidate checks. If the wearer is a witch, she gains the cackle hex. If the wearer already has the cackle hex, twice per day she can use her cackle ability as a swift action instead of a move action. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells hideous laughter or the cackle hex, creator must have 5 ranks in Intimidate; Cost 3,000 gp.
